data.title: Trump comments on non-farm data: Great employment data, much better than expected
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump commented on the non-agricultural data: great employment data, much better than expected, he also said: "We can't lose!" (Jinshi)

data.title: Lens Chain, a social media development network, is now live
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The social media development network Lens Chain launched by the founder of DeFi company Aave has launched its mainnet. Lens has established partnerships with multiple DeFi and infrastructure projects, including Uniswap, Balancer, LayerZero, Circle, Consensys and Chainlink, aiming to unleash the economic potential of decentralized "SocialFi". (CoinDesk)

data.title: Market Anticipates Significant Federal Reserve Rate Cuts Amid Recession Risks
data.description: According to Odaily, Columbia Threadneedle Investments' rate strategist, Hussainy, stated that the market is betting on recession risks and tightening financial conditions forcing the Federal Reserve to significantly cut interest rates this year, potentially by about 100 basis points. Regarding U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's speech later today, Hussainy believes that if Powell and his team signal any opposition to this expectation, short-term interest rates may deviate.

data.title: Federal Reserve's May Rate Decision Likely to Remain Unchanged
data.description: According to Odaily, following the release of non-farm payroll data, the CME's "FedWatch" tool indicates a 56.7% probability that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates unchanged in May, down from 60.1% before the data release. The likelihood of a 25 basis point rate cut stands at 43.3%. For June, there is a 0% probability of maintaining the current rate, with a 52.1% chance of a cumulative 25 basis point cut, a 44.3% chance of a 50 basis point cut, and a 3.5% chance of a 75 basis point cut.

data.title: After the release of the non-agricultural data, the probability of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in May dropped to 56.7%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After the release of the non-agricultural data, according to CME's "Fed Watch": the probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in May is 56.7%, which is lower than 60.1% before the release of the non-agricultural data. The probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 43.3%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged by June is 0, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 52.1%, the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 44.3%, and the probability of a cumulative 75 basis point rate cut is 3.5%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump tells investors policy won't change
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump posted a message to investors on social media saying that my policies will never change. It is reported that Trump also said: "Now is a good time to get rich, and investors will be richer than ever before."

data.title: Analyst: The Fed may cut interest rates by about 100 basis points this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hussainy, interest rate strategist at Columbia Thread Investments, said: "The market is betting that recession risks and tightening financial conditions will force the Fed to cut interest rates sharply this year, possibly by about 100 basis points." As for Powell's speech later today, Hussainy believes: "If Powell and his team send any rebuttal signals to this, short-term interest rates may go astray." (Jinshi)

data.title: Grayscale Files Solana ETF Application with SEC
data.description: According to Odaily, Grayscale has submitted an S-1 form to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a Solana Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). This move marks another step in Grayscale's efforts to expand its cryptocurrency offerings. The application is currently under review by the SEC, which will determine whether to approve the proposed ETF.

data.title: Grayscale Submits Solana ETF’s S-1 Form to the US SEC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to information on the website of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, Grayscale has submitted the S-1 form of Solana ETF to the U.S. SEC.

data.title: Traders cut bets on Fed rate cuts, see June as likely start of rate cuts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Traders cut their bets on the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates in May, predicting that June will be the possible start of rate cuts, and traders continue to bet that the Federal Reserve will implement four rate cuts by the end of the year. (Jinshi)
